_notes: metric=same-study/same-artery retrieval@1 (higher; baseline=raw features). The BINDING gate is max_leakage<=0.035 (fold-fit angle R2 at/below raw). require_delta_ci_excludes_0=false because the retrieval target is non-inferiority to raw (>=0), not strict superiority; the leakage cap is what must be cleared. negctrl: shuffled-angle gaugeflow must not beat raw retrieval.
